languages.text: {n}На долю секунды злобное торжество превращает и без того изломанные черты Тервантьяса в гротескную маску.{/n} "О, я наконец-то слышу разумную речь из твоих уст, ничтожное создание. Однако, тебе недостает рвения. Повтори это еще раз — громко, выразительно. Так, чтобы я мог расслышать твой лепет, не напрягая слух".

{n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."
languages.original_text: {n}На долю секунды злобное торжество превращает и без того изломанные черты Тервантьяса в гротескную маску.{/n} "О, я наконец-то слышу разумную речь из твоих уст, ничтожное создание. Однако, тебе недостает рвения. Повтори это еще раз — громко, выразительно. Так, чтобы я мог расслышать твой лепет, не напрягая слух".

traits.locale_text: {n}For a split second, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already distorted features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, I finally hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. However, you lack zeal. Repeat it once more loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

However, you lack zeal. Repeat it once more loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

{n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

languages.text: {n}Für einen kurzen Augenblick verwandelt böswilliger Triumph Tervantias' ohnehin schon entstelltes Gesicht in eine groteske Maske.{/n} "Oh, endlich höre ich einen Funken Verstand aus Eurem Mund, erbärmlicher Wurm. Aber ich bin noch nicht überzeugt. Sagt es noch einmal. Laut und deutlich. Ich will Euer Geplapper hören, ohne meine Ohren anzustrengen."
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

traits.locale_text: {n}Für einen kurzen Augenblick verwandelt böswilliger Triumph Tervantias' ohnehin schon entstelltes Gesicht in eine groteske Maske.{/n} "Oh, endlich höre ich einen Funken Verstand aus Eurem Mund, erbärmlicher Wurm. Aber ich bin noch nicht überzeugt. Sagt es noch einmal. Laut und deutlich. Ich will Euer Geplapper hören, ohne meine Ohren anzustrengen."

languages.text: {n}Le masque grotesque de Tervantias se déforme davantage dans un sourire triomphant.{/n} « Oh, je suis ravi d'entendre enfin de sages paroles sortir de votre bouche, misérable créature. Mais vous manquez de zèle. Répétez ce que vous venez de me dire, mais à voix haute. Je veux entendre vos bredouillages sans avoir à tendre l'oreille. »
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le masque grotesque de Tervantias se déforme davantage dans un sourire triomphant.{/n} « Oh, je suis ravi d'entendre enfin de sages paroles sortir de votre bouche, misérable créature. Mais vous manquez de zèle. Répétez ce que vous venez de me dire, mais à voix haute. Je veux entendre vos bredouillages sans avoir à tendre l'oreille. »

languages.text: {n}Por un momento, el triunfo malévolo retuerce el ya mutilado rostro de Tervantias, dejando una máscara grotesca.{/n} «Ah, por fin entras en razón, miserable. Pero te falta fervor. Repítelo otra vez, alto y claro, para que pueda oírte sin tener que forzar el oído».
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

traits.locale_text: {n}Por un momento, el triunfo malévolo retuerce el ya mutilado rostro de Tervantias, dejando una máscara grotesca.{/n} «Ah, por fin entras en razón, miserable. Pero te falta fervor. Repítelo otra vez, alto y claro, para que pueda oírte sin tener que forzar el oído».

languages.text: {n}Kötü niyetli zafer ifadesi, Tervantias'ın zaten sakat olan yüz hatlarını bir anlığına grotesk bir maskeye dönüştürüyor.{/n} "Nihayet dudaklarından bir parça mantık döküldü sefil yaratık. Fakat şevkten yoksunsun. Bir kez daha, yüksek ve net bir şekilde tekrarla. Kulaklarımı yormadan o zırvalamalarını yakalayabileyim."
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

traits.locale_text: {n}Kötü niyetli zafer ifadesi, Tervantias'ın zaten sakat olan yüz hatlarını bir anlığına grotesk bir maskeye dönüştürüyor.{/n} "Nihayet dudaklarından bir parça mantık döküldü sefil yaratık. Fakat şevkten yoksunsun. Bir kez daha, yüksek ve net bir şekilde tekrarla. Kulaklarımı yormadan o zırvalamalarını yakalayabileyim."

languages.text: {n}一瞬间，恶毒的得意之情将特万提亚斯那本就残破的面容拧成了一副丑恶的鬼脸。{/n}“总算从你这可怜虫嘴里听到了一句像样的话了。可你说得不够热切。再说一遍，说大声点，清楚点。省得我费劲去听你那含糊的嘟囔声。”
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

traits.locale_text: {n}一瞬间，恶毒的得意之情将特万提亚斯那本就残破的面容拧成了一副丑恶的鬼脸。{/n}“总算从你这可怜虫嘴里听到了一句像样的话了。可你说得不够热切。再说一遍，说大声点，清楚点。省得我费劲去听你那含糊的嘟囔声。”

languages.text: {n}つかの間、悪意に満ちた勝ち誇りが、すでに損なわれているテルヴァンティアスの容貌を、グロテスクな仮面へとゆがめる。{/n}「ほう、ようやく貴様の口から、ひとかけらの分別が聞けたな、惨めな生き物め。だが、熱意が足りん。もう一度、大きく、はっきりと繰り返せ。私が耳をそばだてずとも、貴様のたわごとを聞き取れるようにな」
languages.original_text: {n}For a moment, malicious triumph twists Tervantias's already mutilated features into a grotesque mask.{/n} "Oh, finally I hear a shred of reason from your lips, you miserable creature. But you lack zeal. Repeat it once more, loudly and clearly. So that I may catch your babbling without having to strain my ears."

traits.locale_text: {n}つかの間、悪意に満ちた勝ち誇りが、すでに損なわれているテルヴァンティアスの容貌を、グロテスクな仮面へとゆがめる。{/n}「ほう、ようやく貴様の口から、ひとかけらの分別が聞けたな、惨めな生き物め。だが、熱意が足りん。もう一度、大きく、はっきりと繰り返せ。私が耳をそばだてずとも、貴様のたわごとを聞き取れるようにな」
